DA OPP TO MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT ON DA MTR/X: DEFENDANT IS ON COURT PROBATION, NOREPORT WAS GENERATED/X: FOR REASONS AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD, THE PEOPLE WITHDRAW THE MTR/REIN ORIG TC/P/PROB EXP: 07-25-21 /X: MATTER IS TAKENOFF CALENDAR/

/CAL:PHC ON DA MTR/X:THE PEOPLE WITHDRAW MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/X:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON PROBATION/SUPP:11-05-20/17/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CONTD:RECPT OF PROGRESS REPORT ON PROBATION STATUS/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/

/CAL:DA 1203,2 PC MOTION/INTC/WIAMTR/S17/PROB ADM REV/OR/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:DA MTR HEARING/
X/TWS/CH6 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 2D/CTS 2/WS/VF2 150/OR25/SATERM/SA2 350 GLDEN GATE AVE,, SF/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/CTORD:FINES AND FEES SUSPENDED/INTC/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTIOTO ADD COUNT 6, A MISDEMEANOR CHARGE OF 32PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 06-17-19/987,2/SAORD/SA2: 350 GOLDEN GATE AVE, SF(EXCEPTION OF RIDING ON PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION)/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON  5-01-19, D11/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & PD MTS/INTC/X:THE PEOPLE REQUEST A CONTINUANCEDUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF A WITNESS/MO GRTD/CONT/DOP/
